nasb.text: For from Israel is even this! A craftsman made it, so it is not God; Surely the calf of Samaria will be broken to pieces.

esv.text: For it is from Israel; a craftsman made it; it is not God. The calf of Samaria shall be broken to pieces.

cnv.text: 這牛犢是出於以色列， 是匠人所做的，它並不是神， 撒瑪利亞的牛犢必被粉碎。

ccb.text: 这牛犊是以色列的工匠造的， 并不是神，必被砸得粉碎。
